<!--
Update this file before publishing when you want branch-specific lead-in notes.
GitHub Actions prepends this Markdown above GitHub-generated release notes.
-->

## Highlights

- Global shortcuts recover more reliably if recording state handling is interrupted.
- Soniox defaults now target the v5 real-time model, with sturdier fallback delivery for live dictation.
- The audio visualizer responds better across microphones with different sample rates.
- Installed model lists now show model sizes, and long post-processing prompt names no longer overflow dropdowns.

---

**Notice:**
If the application crashes on an older CPU during transcription, use the Microsoft Store build when a matching Store release is available for this version: https://github.com/MaxITService/AIVORelay/releases/tag/v1.0.20-store
